rag_rules: When AGREE diagnostics report unresolved references or type errors, trace the issue to the first invalid identifier or helper on the same line and fix the root cause.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex to avoid 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all identifiers are properly resolved and types match on both sides of expressions.
Avoid introducing package-qualified names or types not present in the model's configured dependencies.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assignments in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE type or reference errors; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
